chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2805 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA No.11895/2018. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Baloch, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. Mr. Fayaz Ahmed Laghari advocate for respondents No.2to4. None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2018 and it was lastly fixed in Court on 05.09.2024 where on that date, following order was passed:- “Counsel appearing on behalf of petitioner is called absent without any intimation. As an indulgence and by way of last chance the matter is adjourned with a note of caution that if none appears on the next date, appropriate orders which may include dismissal of the petition would be passed without providing further opportunity. Adjourned.” Thereafter the petitioner has not pursued his petition. It shows that the petitioner has lost his interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
